{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Sales Representative",
  "description": "Stellar International Company Limited&nbsp;is a subsidiary of RSIN Group which entered Africa in 2008. Stellar International Co. Limited has three businesses, namely Recycling Ant, Ant Express and Antshop Online.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Sales Representative

Job Locations:&nbsp;Cotonou, Sakete - Benin Republic and Idirokg / Bagagry, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
Market development and expansion:


	Responsible for market research on steel and textile products in Cotonou and its surrounding areas, analyzing customer needs and competitive dynamics; developing new customers (wholesalers, retailers, engineering contractors, etc.) and establishing long-term partnerships; promoting the company&rsquo;s core products such as nails, rebar, mattresses, and pillows, and achieving sales targets.


Sales execution and coordination:


	Complete the sales process independently (quote generation, contract signing, payment processing, shipping, and so on).
	Coordinate logistics, warehousing, and other departments to ensure timely delivery of orders.
	&nbsp;Submit sales reports regularly, analyze sales data, and develop improvement plans.


Requirements


	The supervisor needs to be familiar with port congestion situations, transit procedures, warehousing, and distribution.
	They should be able to handle unexpected situations such as cargo delays and detention at customs.
	Ability to communicate in both French and English, with the capacity to negotiate independently with local clients.
	Proficient use of office software (Word, Excel, PPT).


A plus point:


	Possess local customer resources or a network of channels in Benin.
	Familiarity with the characteristics of steel and textile products, as well as industry trends.
	Possesses a driver&rsquo;s license and is proficient in driving (for ease of traveling within the region).


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;stellarinternationalhr@gmail.com&nbsp;CC:&nbsp;stellarinternationaljobs@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position&nbsp; and Location as the subject of the mail.",

Senior Sales Representative Job at Stellar International Company Limited




        
    

        
        Stellar International Company Limited is a subsidiary of RSIN Group which entered Africa in 2008. Stellar International Co. Limited has three businesses, namely Recycling Ant, Ant Express and Antshop Online.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Sales Representative

Job Locations: Cotonou, Sakete - Benin Republic and Idirokg / Bagagry, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
Market development and expansion:
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Responsible for market research on steel and textile products in Cotonou and its surrounding areas, analyzing customer needs and competitive dynamics; developing new customers (wholesalers, retailers, engineering contractors, etc.) and establishing long-term partnerships; promoting the company’s core products such as nails, rebar, mattresses, and pillows, and achieving sales targets.


Sales execution and coordination:


	Complete the sales process independently (quote generation, contract signing, payment processing, shipping, and so on).
	Coordinate logistics, warehousing, and other departments to ensure timely delivery of orders.
	 Submit sales reports regularly, analyze sales data, and develop improvement plans.


Requirements


	The supervisor needs to be familiar with port congestion situations, transit procedures, warehousing, and distribution.
	They should be able to handle unexpected situations such as cargo delays and detention at customs.
	Ability to communicate in both French and English, with the capacity to negotiate independently with local clients.
	Proficient use of office software (Word, Excel, PPT).


A plus point:


	Possess local customer resources or a network of channels in Benin.
	Familiarity with the characteristics of steel and textile products, as well as industry trends.
	Possesses a driver’s license and is proficient in driving (for ease of traveling within the region).


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] CC: [email protected] using the Job Position  and Location as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Cashier",
  "description": "Stephanie Nicholas Solutions is a locally-owned company foundedin2019, specializingin providing professional cleaning services, facility maintenance, fumigation, furnishing and finishing for companies and organizations.&nbsp;Its mission is to create clean and healthy work spaces through world-class facility management and cleaning techniques, ensuring customer satisfaction with innovation and a hands-on approach.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a reliable and customer-focused Cashier to accurately process customer transactions, handle cash and other payment methods, and provide excellent customer service in a fast-paced environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Process customer transactions accurately and efficiently
	Handle cash, credit cards, and other payment methods
	Balance the cash register and reconcile any discrepancies
	Provide excellent customer service and resolve customer issues promptly
	Maintain a clean and organized workspace
	Meet sales targets and promote products or services as needed


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an SSCE, OND, or HND qualification with 1-3 years of experience.
	Previous cash handling experience is preferred
	Excellent customer service skills
	Basic math skills with strong attention to accuracy
	Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced environment
	Good communication skills.


Salary
N90,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to:&nbsp;snsolutions690@gmail.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Cashier&rdquo; as the subject of the email.

Note


	No Accomodation
	For more information WhatsApp 08129982839.

Cashier Job at Stephanie Nicholas Solutions




        
    

        
        Stephanie Nicholas Solutions is a locally-owned company foundedin2019, specializingin providing professional cleaning services, facility maintenance, fumigation, furnishing and finishing for companies and organizations. Its mission is to create clean and healthy work spaces through world-class facility management and cleaning techniques, ensuring customer satisfaction with innovation and a hands-on approach.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Cashier

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a reliable and customer-focused Cashier to accurately process customer transactions, handle cash and other payment methods, and provide excellent customer service in a fast-paced environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Process customer transactions accurately and efficiently
	Handle cash, credit cards, and other payment methods
	Balance the cash register and reconcile any discrepancies
	Provide excellent customer service and resolve customer issues promptly
	Maintain a clean and organized workspace
	Meet sales targets and promote products or services as needed


Requirements


	Interested candidates should possess an SSCE, OND, or HND qualification with 1-3 years of experience.
	Previous cash handling experience is preferred
	Excellent customer service skills
	Basic math skills with strong attention to accuracy
	Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced environment
	Good communication skills.


Salary
N90,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using “Cashier” as the subject of the email.

Note


	No Accomodation
	For more information WhatsApp 08129982839.
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "Nycil Limited is a pioneer in the manufacturing of Alkyd Resins, Polyvinyl Acetate and other Adhesives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales &amp; Marketing Officer
Job Locations:&nbsp;Onitsha - Anambra, and Benin - Edo (Depots)
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities


	Target Achievement:&nbsp;Drive sales volumes to meet regional targets, identifying and capitalizing on market opportunities to grow market share.
	Customer Relationship &amp; Account Management: Cultivate long-term relationships with key clients, providing technical sales support
	Market Analysis: Monitor competitor activities, analyze trends, and report on market developments to adjust marketing strategies.


Requirements


	Candidates for this position should preferably have B.Sc. in Chemistry, Marketing, Economics, or any related subject.
	3-10+ years of experience in sales, marketing, or operations management, preferably in a manufacturing company.


Knowledge, Skill and Ability:


	Strong understanding of chemical products, raw materials (resins, solvents), and their applications.


Other Requirements:


	Good communication skill, able to take records properly, teamwork and good relationship with others. Analytical skills to assess market trends.


Salary
N300,000 - N400,000 per month (Remuneration packages for the positions are attractive and competitive for the right candidates).

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;michael.adekunle@nycil.org&nbsp;and copy:&nbsp;recruitmentpersonnel02@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Sales & Marketing Officer Job at Nycil Limited




        
    

        
        Nycil Limited is a pioneer in the manufacturing of Alkyd Resins, Polyvinyl Acetate and other Adhesives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales & Marketing Officer
Job Locations: Onitsha - Anambra, and Benin - Edo (Depots)
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Target Achievement: Drive sales volumes to meet regional targets, identifying and capitalizing on market opportunities to grow market share.
	Customer Relationship & Account Management: Cultivate long-term relationships with key clients, providing technical sales support
	Market Analysis: Monitor competitor activities, analyze trends, and report on market developments to adjust marketing strategies.


Requirements


	Candidates for this position should preferably have B.Sc. in Chemistry, Marketing, Economics, or any related subject.
	3-10+ years of experience in sales, marketing, or operations management, preferably in a manufacturing company.


Knowledge, Skill and Ability:


	Strong understanding of chemical products, raw materials (resins, solvents), and their applications.


Other Requirements:


	Good communication skill, able to take records properly, teamwork and good relationship with others. Analytical skills to assess market trends.


Salary
N300,000 - N400,000 per month (Remuneration packages for the positions are attractive and competitive for the right candidates).

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] and copy: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Data Entry Operator",
  "description": "Flour Mills of Nigeria Plc has been a part of the lives of Nigerians at home and abroad. Our global vision is to be a leading foods company in Africa providing high quality and affordable products in the most convenient ways to consumers through world class brands like Golden Penny Flour, Golden Penny Semovita, Goldenvita, Golden Pasta and Golden Noodles. The Company&#39;s flagship brand, Golden Penny, remains one of the best known and the preferred brands amongst bakers, confectioneries and consumers in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Data Entry Operator - Niger Mills

Job Location:&nbsp;Calabar, Cross River

Purpose


	Ensure accurate and efficient data entry, validation, and management to maintain seamless business operations and proper record-keeping. Support administrative and operational teams by handling data-related tasks in compliance with company policies and standards.


The Job&nbsp;


	Enter, update, and maintain data in company systems, databases, and spreadsheets accurately.
	Verify and cross-check data for errors, inconsistencies, and missing information.
	Maintain confidentiality and security of sensitive data in line with company policies.
	Retrieve, compile, and provide data reports as required.
	Organize and maintain electronic and physical records systematically.
	Coordinate with other departments to ensure data integrity and consistency.
	Follow company procedures and guidelines for data entry and record management.
	Resolve discrepancies and escalate data issues to the supervisor when necessary.
	Assist in preparing documentation for data-related processes.
	Ensure timely completion of assigned tasks and meet reporting deadlines.


Qualification


	Strictly Diploma / OND in a related field.


Experience:


	1 - 3 years of experience in data entry or related role.
	Experience using ERP systems or database management tools is an advantage.


The Person Must:


	Demonstrate high accuracy and attention to detail.
	Be proficient in Microsoft Office Suite, especially Excel and Word.
	Have good organizational and time management skills.
	Be able to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
	Maintain confidentiality and professionalism at all times.
	Possess good communication and teamwork skills.

Data Entry Operator Job at Flour Mills of Nigeria Plc




        
    

        
        Flour Mills of Nigeria Plc has been a part of the lives of Nigerians at home and abroad. Our global vision is to be a leading foods company in Africa providing high quality and affordable products in the most convenient ways to consumers through world class brands like Golden Penny Flour, Golden Penny Semovita, Goldenvita, Golden Pasta and Golden Noodles. The Company's flagship brand, Golden Penny, remains one of the best known and the preferred brands amongst bakers, confectioneries and consumers in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Data Entry Operator - Niger Mills

Job Location: Calabar, Cross River

Purpose
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Ensure accurate and efficient data entry, validation, and management to maintain seamless business operations and proper record-keeping. Support administrative and operational teams by handling data-related tasks in compliance with company policies and standards.


The Job 


	Enter, update, and maintain data in company systems, databases, and spreadsheets accurately.
	Verify and cross-check data for errors, inconsistencies, and missing information.
	Maintain confidentiality and security of sensitive data in line with company policies.
	Retrieve, compile, and provide data reports as required.
	Organize and maintain electronic and physical records systematically.
	Coordinate with other departments to ensure data integrity and consistency.
	Follow company procedures and guidelines for data entry and record management.
	Resolve discrepancies and escalate data issues to the supervisor when necessary.
	Assist in preparing documentation for data-related processes.
	Ensure timely completion of assigned tasks and meet reporting deadlines.


Qualification


	Strictly Diploma / OND in a related field.


Experience:


	1 - 3 years of experience in data entry or related role.
	Experience using ERP systems or database management tools is an advantage.


The Person Must:


	Demonstrate high accuracy and attention to detail.
	Be proficient in Microsoft Office Suite, especially Excel and Word.
	Have good organizational and time management skills.
	Be able to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
	Maintain confidentiality and professionalism at all times.
	Possess good communication and teamwork skills.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Logistics Assistant",
  "description": "Flour Mills of Nigeria Plc has been a part of the lives of Nigerians at home and abroad. Our global vision is to be a leading foods company in Africa providing high quality and affordable products in the most convenient ways to consumers through world class brands like Golden Penny Flour, Golden Penny Semovita, Goldenvita, Golden Pasta and Golden Noodles. The Company&#39;s flagship brand, Golden Penny, remains one of the best known and the preferred brands amongst bakers, confectioneries and consumers in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Logistics Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Calabar, Cross River

Purpose


	Support logistics and dispatch operations by coordinating shipments, maintaining accurate records, and ensuring timely delivery of goods in compliance with company policies and procedures.


The Job&nbsp;


	Coordinate inbound and outbound shipments to ensure timely and accurate deliveries.
	Track shipments and update stakeholders on delivery status, including delays where necessary.
	Prepare and maintain logistics documentation such as invoices, shipping records, and inventory reports.
	Liaise with transporters, warehouse teams, and suppliers to ensure smooth logistics operations.
	Monitor inventory levels and assist with stock reconciliation and discrepancies.
	Ensure compliance with safety regulations, company policies, and industry standards.
	Support the logistics team in resolving transportation issues and optimizing delivery routes.
	Verify shipment details and reconcile discrepancies with suppliers and transporters.
	Maintain proper filing systems for logistics records and documentation.
	Assist in preparing reports on logistics performance, costs, and operational efficiency.


Qualification


	Strictly Diploma / OND in a related field.


Experience:


	1 - 3 years of experience in logistics, supply chain, or dispatch operations.
	Experience in FMCG or manufacturing environment is an added advantage.


The Person Must:


	Have strong organizational and multitasking skills.
	Possess good attention to detail and accuracy.
	Be able to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
	Have good communication and teamwork skills.
	Be proficient in Microsoft Office tools, especially Excel and Word.
	Demonstrate problem-solving ability in handling logistics issues.

        Flour Mills of Nigeria Plc has been a part of the lives of Nigerians at home and abroad. Our global vision is to be a leading foods company in Africa providing high quality and affordable products in the most convenient ways to consumers through world class brands like Golden Penny Flour, Golden Penny Semovita, Goldenvita, Golden Pasta and Golden Noodles. The Company's flagship brand, Golden Penny, remains one of the best known and the preferred brands amongst bakers, confectioneries and consumers in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Logistics Assistant

Job Location: Calabar, Cross River

Purpose
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Support logistics and dispatch operations by coordinating shipments, maintaining accurate records, and ensuring timely delivery of goods in compliance with company policies and procedures.


The Job 


	Coordinate inbound and outbound shipments to ensure timely and accurate deliveries.
	Track shipments and update stakeholders on delivery status, including delays where necessary.
	Prepare and maintain logistics documentation such as invoices, shipping records, and inventory reports.
	Liaise with transporters, warehouse teams, and suppliers to ensure smooth logistics operations.
	Monitor inventory levels and assist with stock reconciliation and discrepancies.
	Ensure compliance with safety regulations, company policies, and industry standards.
	Support the logistics team in resolving transportation issues and optimizing delivery routes.
	Verify shipment details and reconcile discrepancies with suppliers and transporters.
	Maintain proper filing systems for logistics records and documentation.
	Assist in preparing reports on logistics performance, costs, and operational efficiency.


Qualification


	Strictly Diploma / OND in a related field.


Experience:


	1 - 3 years of experience in logistics, supply chain, or dispatch operations.
	Experience in FMCG or manufacturing environment is an added advantage.


The Person Must:


	Have strong organizational and multitasking skills.
	Possess good attention to detail and accuracy.
	Be able to work under pressure and meet deadlines.
	Have good communication and teamwork skills.
	Be proficient in Microsoft Office tools, especially Excel and Word.
	Demonstrate problem-solving ability in handling logistics issues.
